response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in full-stack development with TypeScript and various technologies, but their seniority level and diverse technology stack may not align perfectly with the junior/mid-level position requirements.
strengths: Proficient in TypeScript and full-stack development
Experience with various technologies including Node.js, React, and AWS
Strong background in software development with a focus on testable projects
concerns: Seniority level may be too high for the junior/mid-level position
Diverse technology stack might indicate a lack of focus on the specific tech stack required
High on-site presence requirement might be challenging due to potential relocation or remote work expectations
